home.name: Murilo Wisch
home.title: Analysis and Systems Development student focused on Backend.
home.subtitle: Currently working at TopSoft, a technology and business solutions company, expanding my practical exposure to corporate systems, business processes, and software environments. In parallel, I am directing my education toward backend development with Java and Spring Boot, REST APIs, databases, security, and application architecture.
home.about_p1: I am an Analysis and Systems Development student at PUC Minas, currently in the 3rd semester, focused on backend development using Java and Spring Boot. I have experience building REST APIs, integrating databases, and using Git for version control.
home.about_p2: I am passionate about technology, software development, and challenges that create constant learning. Outside coding, I train at the gym daily, enjoy video games, and value discipline, consistency, and growth through small continuous actions.
